CustomField.description: Shows if an onboarding is active and in-progress, passed back to sales, postponed, or cancelled prior to activation. Used to track the status of an onboarding separate from where they are in the funnel.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Shows if an onboarding is active and in-progress, passed back to sales, postponed, or cancelled prior to activation. Used to track the status of an onboarding separate from where they are in the funnel.
CustomField.label: Onboarding Status
